services.name: Professional Listing Photos
services.shortDescription: Bright, clean, MLS-ready imagery designed to present each property clearly and professionally.
services.longDescription: Use this section to explain what makes the photography deliverable strong: polish, consistency, editing standards, and the kind of image coverage agents expect for listing media.

services.name: Drone Photography & Video
services.shortDescription: Aerial stills and motion for properties where the lot, setting, or surrounding neighborhood matters.
services.longDescription: This is where the site should lean into aerial context and trust. The Base44 concept explicitly used the licensed drone pilot angle as a credibility driver.
features: Useful for waterfront, acreage, and luxury properties

services.name: Video Walkthroughs
services.shortDescription: Simple, polished walkthrough coverage built for websites, social posting, and listing promotion.
services.longDescription: The Base44 concept showed tiered walkthrough pricing. Keep this service clear and practical rather than overproduced unless the real offer becomes more premium.
features: Clear pricing by size or scope
Simple add-on logic to pair with photo packages
